skill.summary: MANDATORY — invoke this skill BEFORE making any Blockscout MCP tool calls or writing any blockchain data scripts, even when the Blockscout MCP server is alre...

latestVersion.changelog:
- Significant update: Introduces architectural rules and workflows for all Blockscout MCP data access and script building.
- Calling unlock_blockchain_analysis is now mandatory before any MCP tool usage (except in specific environments).
- Comprehensive guidance on execution strategies: when to use MCP tools, scripts, hybrid approaches, or LLM reasoning.
- Clarifies REST API conventions, endpoint discovery, pagination, and response transformation requirements.
- Documents all 16 available MCP tools and explains the data source priority for on-chain analysis across all EVM chains.
- Adds details on using Chainscout for chain registry lookups, with clear guidance on its separation from MCP workflows.
